name: Caribbean Christmas Ring
recipeIngredient: 1 cup sour cream or plain non-fat yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly grease a 10 to 12 cup microwave-safe Bundt pan with shortening and sprinkle with 1/2 cup of the chopped walnuts.
2. Sift together all-purpose flour, whole wheat flour, baking powder, and baking soda; set aside.
3. Cream butter and sugar until fluffy. Beat in eggs one at a time.
4. Stir sour cream or yogurt, banana, and orange liqueur into egg mixture.
5. Combine the sifted dry ingredients with the banana-egg mixture, stirring in the remaining walnuts.
6. Spoon batter into prepared pan.
7. Place pan on a microwave-safe bowl in the center of the microwave.
8. Cook on medium for 10 minutes, then cook on high for 5 to 7 minutes until cake tests done (toothpick inserted comes out clean). Turn off and let cool.
9. Mix sifted confectioner's sugar with orange juice until smooth.
10. Pour glaze evenly over cooled cake and serve.
Note: Recipe by Holiday Sweets & Treats Vol 1 No 1 from Izzy And Pj (izzypj@aei.ca) on October 24, 1996.
